prompt: Create a bright, photorealistic lifestyle image of a cute compact retro electric car in a soft pastel mint green, parked in a seaside parking lot on a sunny day. The car has a rounded beetle-like body, circular headlights, smooth glossy paint, cream leather interior, small chrome details, whitewall-style tires, rounded hubcaps, a blank front license plate, and subtle brown trim accents along the lower grille and side sill. A young woman with short blonde bob hair stands casually beside the passenger side, leaning lightly near the door with relaxed posture; her face is softly obscured or featureless. She wears a pale mint short-sleeve cardigan over a cream romper with white strappy sandals, matching the car’s gentle pastel aesthetic. The background shows a vivid turquoise ocean, distant green coastline and hills, blue sky with small white clouds, a low metal guardrail, parking space lines, curb stones, and a leafy tree branch in the upper right corner. Use natural midday sunlight, crisp shadows, clean commercial photography composition, 3/4 front view of the car, cheerful summer mood, realistic proportions, high detail, 4:3 landscape framing.
